title: Discover AI for leaders in retail
summary: In this learning path, retail business leaders find all the knowledge and resources to adopt AI in their organizations. It discusses available resources, strategy, responsible practices, and retail use cases.

sections.title: Discover AI for leaders in retail
sections.summary: In this learning path, retail business leaders find all the knowledge and resources to adopt AI in their organizations. It discusses available resources, strategy, responsible practices, and retail use cases.

lessons.title: Leverage AI tools and resources for your business
lessons.content_md:
Learn how to use AI tools and resources for your business.

Fuente oficial: https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/training/modules/leverage-ai-tools/?WT.mc_id=api_CatalogApi

sources.title: Leverage AI tools and resources for your business

lessons.title: Create business value with AI
lessons.content_md:
Learn how to align AI to business strategy and ensure readiness using essential drivers for scalable, impactful, secure adoption.

Fuente oficial: https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/training/modules/create-business-value/?WT.mc_id=api_CatalogApi

lessons.title: Embrace responsible AI principles and practices
lessons.content_md:
Explore six principles to guide AI development and use - fairness, reliability and safety, privacy and security, inclusiveness, transparency, and accountability.

Fuente oficial: https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/training/modules/embrace-responsible-ai-principles-practices/?WT.mc_id=api_CatalogApi

sources.title: Embrace responsible AI principles and practices

lessons.title: Scale AI in your organization
lessons.content_md:
Learn enterprise AI management with our free open online course, including scaling AI.

Fuente oficial: https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/training/modules/scale-ai/?WT.mc_id=api_CatalogApi

lessons.title: Define a Microsoft AI strategy to create business value in retail
lessons.content_md:
Discover AI use cases and scenarios for retail. Get familiar with Microsoft AI tools and services for retail. Learn from real success stories.

Fuente oficial: https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/training/modules/define-microsoft-ai-strategy-retail/?WT.mc_id=api_CatalogApi

sources.title: Define a Microsoft AI strategy to create business value in retail

labs.title: Laboratorio opcional: aplica Discover AI for leaders in retail
labs.instructions_md: Lleva a la practica lo aprendido en **Discover AI for leaders in retail**. Implementa un escenario pequeno y documenta tu solucion. Este laboratorio es opcional pero refuerza la retencion.

rubric.description: La solucion cumple el objetivo del laboratorio.
La explicacion es comprensible y ordenada.
